query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exchangeRates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `fromCurrencyCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `toCurrencyCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `baselineRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `currentRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `predictedRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `effectiveDate` varchar(20),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 34DzJoQKEqyc4cp.root --database MtjPfUT7z9e3zhUb3tuetB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `exchangeRates` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `projectId` int NOT NULL,
  `fromCurrencyCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `toCurrencyCode` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `baselineRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `currentRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `predictedRate` decimal(18,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.000000',
  `effectiveDate` varchar(20),
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
)
